# AccountabilityOf — accountabilityof.ai

> AI Accountability Ledger

## Pricing
- Free: £0/mo (5-min scorecard)
- Pro: £29/mo (full AI Accountability Ledger, MCP access)
- Enterprise: £199/mo (multi-entity, SSO, API quotas)
- One-time: Article 50 Kit £999, Watchdog Cert £4,950

## Stripe
- Sovereign £29: https://buy.stripe.com/9B67sNeoIcMObEx56o8k91S
- Pro £199: https://buy.stripe.com/eVq14p1BWcMO4c59mE8k91T

## MCP server
- Endpoint: https://accountabilityof.ai/mcp
- Tools: ai-incident-reporting-mcp, ai-self-audit-mcp

## EU AI Act
- Article 50 (transparency): 2 Aug 2026 cliff
- Article 51 (post-market monitoring): ongoing
- Watchdog Cert add-on: signed Ed25519+HMAC-SHA256 attestation
